rows.test_case: 1. Launch browser. 2. Navigate to https://www.amazon.sg. 3. Wait for search input (name="field-keywords"). 4. Enter "headphones". 5. Press Enter. 6. Wait for search results to load. 7. Validate at least one result is displayed. 8. Close browser.

1. Launch browser and navigate to Amazon SG. 2. Search for "laptop stand". 3. Click on first product. 4. Wait for product title (id="productTitle"). 5. Validate product title is visible. 6. Close browser.
1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "asdasd123!@#". 3. Wait for results page. 4. Validate "no results" or limited results message appears. 5. Close browser.

rows.test_case: 1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "phone". 3. Select "Price: Low to High" sort option. 4. Wait for results refresh. 5. Validate sorting dropdown reflects selected option. 6. Close browser.
1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "backpack". 3. Open first product. 4. Validate product image is loaded (img not broken). 5. Close browser.

rows.test_case: 1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "monitor". 3. Click first product. 4. Click browser back button. 5. Validate search results page is displayed. 6. Close browser.
1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Add product to cart. 3. Click cart icon (id="nav-cart"). 4. Validate cart page loads. 5. Close browser.

1. Launch browser.
2. Navigate to https://www.amazon.sg.
3. Wait for input[name="field-keywords"] to be visible.
4. Fill input[name="field-keywords"] with "Magic Tree House Boxed Set".
5. Press Enter key in input[name="field-keywords"] to submit the search.
6. Wait for search results to load and for the first product link (e.g., .s-search-results .s-result-item h2 a) to be visible.
7. Click on the first product link in the search results.
8. Wait for the product detail page to load and for the product title (id="productTitle") to be visible.
9. Read the text content of the product title element (id="productTitle").
10. Read the text content of the product price element (e.g., id="priceblock_ourprice" or id="priceblock_dealprice" or .a-price .a-offscreen).
11. Parse the price value as a number.
12. Validate that the price value is less than 25.
13. If validation passes, click the "Add to Cart" button (id="add-to-cart-button").
14. Wait for either a cart confirmation message (e.g., #huc-v2-order-row-confirm-text) to appear OR for the cart count element (id="nav-cart-count") to update and increase by 1.
15. Close the browser.
rows.golden_name: Amazon SG search and add to cart with price guard
